content:
🔥 srt-transmitter | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing and monitoring multiple SRT (Secure Reliable Transport) streams through a desktop graphical user interface.
✨ Key Features: • Stream Management (Start, Stop, Monitor) • Bulk Operations for Streams • Real-time Log Viewing • URL Copying • Dynamic Stream Addition/Removal
📖 Summary: SRT Stream Manager is a cross-platform desktop application built with Electron, React, and TypeScript for managing multiple SRT streams. It offers a user-friendly interface to start, stop, monitor, and configure streams, with features like bulk operations, real-time logs, and persistent storage.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
